commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P2] Manual review is needed because the remaining blocker is a compatibility and security-policy decision, not a narrow automated repair.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain regression is visible; the diff hardens SSH CIDR validation and only changes Worker TypeScript plus tests. (sha=af5cae54527affe487e94b8642f945933f02659f)
commands.review_summary:
The PR validates per-lease AWS and GCP SSH CIDR request fields before building Worker lease config and adds Worker config tests for malformed CIDRs.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main visibly filters malformed per-lease awsSSHCIDRs and gcpSSHCIDRs through validCIDRs inside leaseConfig, and the PR proof shows those inputs rejected after the patch.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Manual review is needed because the remaining blocker is a compatibility and security-policy decision, not a narrow automated repair.

target.title: fix(worker): fail closed on invalid SSH CIDRs
target.body:
## Summary
- validate configured AWS and GCP SSH CIDR lists before building Worker lease config
- reject malformed non-empty CIDR entries instead of silently allowing a configured list to collapse to provider defaults
- tighten IPv4/IPv6 CIDR parsing and add regression coverage from a focused mutation campaign

## Compatibility / Security Note
This intentionally changes malformed `awsSSHCIDRs` and `gcpSSHCIDRs` lease input from best-effort filtering to fail-closed request validation. Splitting this from the Docker Sandbox provider PR keeps the upgrade-visible Worker behavior change reviewable on its own.

Related split from https://github.com/openclaw/crabbox/pull/221.

## Mutation Evidence
A focused StrykerJS campaign against `worker/src/config.ts` exposed the malformed CIDR handling path. The final local report after the fix was retained at `/tmp/crabbox-mutation-reports/stryker-config-final3-20260606-042606/stryker-config.json`.

## Verification
- `npm ci --prefix worker`
- `npm run format:check --prefix worker`
- `npm run lint --prefix worker`
- `npm run check --prefix worker`
- `npm test --prefix worker`
- `npm run build --prefix worker`
- `git diff --check`
target.author: coygeek

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
